docs.title: Welcome to Amigo 👋
docs.text:
Welcome to the Amigo documentation! Here you'll find all the information you need to get started with Amigo, including installation instructions, usage examples, and API references.

It is presently under development, so please check back soon for updates!

  • 📦 GitHub Repository
  • 📦 Example Notebooks (In the process of being updated)
  • 📄 Amigo Paper (cite this if you use Amigo!)
  • 📄 Amigo Image Reconstruction Paper

If you have any questions or need help, feel free to open an issue on the GitHub repository or reach out to the community.

docs.title: Installation
docs.text:
Amigo should be installed from source. Clone the repository and install the package with pip:

git clone https://github.com/LouisDesdoigts/amigo.git
cd amigo
pip install .

It has been developed and locally tested in Python 3.11 on both CPU and GPU, although it is expected to work on newer versions too.

Amigo also requires a set of calibration files, which will be available publicly soon. In the meantime, please contact me directly to obtain them.
